'''鈭歠-j-p''' ('''kafajap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pectinate|pectinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pectinate|pectinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-j-p
|-
! Lemma
| kafajap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifajap|thifajap]] || [[word:jifajap|jifajap]] || [[word:shifajap|shifajap]] || [[word:kifajap|kifajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufajap|thuthufajap]] || [[word:jujufajap|jujufajap]] || [[word:shushufajap|shushufajap]] || [[word:kukufajap|kukufajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufajap|thufajap]] || [[word:jufajap|jufajap]] || [[word:shufajap|shufajap]] || [[word:kufajap|kufajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufajap|thufajap]] || [[word:jufajap|jufajap]] || [[word:shufajap|shufajap]] || [[word:kufajap|kufajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefajap|thefajap]] || [[word:jefajap|jefajap]] || [[word:shefajap|shefajap]] || [[word:kefajap|kefajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofajap|thothofajap]] || [[word:jojofajap|jojofajap]] || [[word:shoshofajap|shoshofajap]] || [[word:kokofajap|kokofajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofajap|thofajap]] || [[word:jofajap|jofajap]] || [[word:shofajap|shofajap]] || [[word:kofajap|kofajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofajap|thofajap]] || [[word:jofajap|jofajap]] || [[word:shofajap|shofajap]] || [[word:kofajap|kofajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]] || [[word:fajap|fajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fajap|th忙fajap]] || [[word:j忙fajap|j忙fajap]] || [[word:sh忙fajap|sh忙fajap]] || [[word:k忙fajap|k忙fajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafajap|thathafajap]] || [[word:jajafajap|jajafajap]] || [[word:shashafajap|shashafajap]] || [[word:kakafajap|kakafajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafajap|thafajap]] || [[word:jafajap|jafajap]] || [[word:shafajap|shafajap]] || [[word:kafajap|kafajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafajap|thafajap]] || [[word:jafajap|jafajap]] || [[word:shafajap|shafajap]] || [[word:kafajap|kafajap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafajap|shafajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafajap|goshafajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafajap|gokishafajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafajapn眉|shafajapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafajapnkn眉|goshafajapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafajapn眉|gokishafajapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafajapsh毛|shafajapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafajapnksh毛|goshafajapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafajapsh毛|gokishafajapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafajapro|shafajapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafajapnkro|goshafajapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafajapro|gokishafajapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafajapmu|shafajapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafajapnkmu|goshafajapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafajapmu|gokishafajapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafajapsher|shafajapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafajapnksher|goshafajapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafajapsher|gokishafajapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafajapng|shafajapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafajapnkng|goshafajapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafajapng|gokishafajapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafajapya|shafajapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafajapnkya|goshafajapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafajapya|gokishafajapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafajapyam|shafajapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafajapnkyam|goshafajapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafajapyam|gokishafajapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafajapn眉sh毛|shafajapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafajapnkn眉sh毛|goshafajapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafajapn眉sh毛|gokishafajapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafajapn眉ro|shafajapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafajapnkn眉ro|goshafajapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafajapn眉ro|gokishafajapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafajapn眉mu|shafajapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafajapnkn眉mu|goshafajapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafajapn眉mu|gokishafajapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafajapsh毛n眉|shafajapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafajapnksh毛n眉|goshafajapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafajapsh毛n眉|gokishafajapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafajapsh毛ro|shafajapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafajapnksh毛ro|goshafajapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafajapsh毛ro|gokishafajapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafajapsh毛mu|shafajapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafajapnksh毛mu|goshafajapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafajapsh毛mu|gokishafajapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafajapron眉|shafajapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafajapnkron眉|goshafajapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafajapron眉|gokishafajapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafajaprosh毛|shafajaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafajapnkrosh毛|goshafajapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafajaprosh毛|gokishafajaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafajapromu|shafajapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafajapnkromu|goshafajapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafajapromu|gokishafajapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafajapmun眉|shafajapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafajapnkmun眉|goshafajapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafajapmun眉|gokishafajapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafajapmush毛|shafajapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafajapnkmush毛|goshafajapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafajapmush毛|gokishafajapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafajapmuro|shafajapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafajapnkmuro|goshafajapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafajapmuro|gokishafajapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
